channel.title: Abouts on fragment
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on fragment

item.title: AboutMe
item.description: Hi, my name is Vivian. I’m from China, lived in Zhejiang during my childhood and I’m currently studying in Guangzhou, incoming SDE next year and this is my Github page. about this website keep record of my thoughts, my writing, my plan… Whatever fragments in my life. contact email: gongzhlin@outlook.com
